description: Analyze human deoxyhemoglobin (PDB: 4HHB) to design a single-molecule FRET experiment. Identify all Cysteine residues across the tetramer (Chains A, B, C, D) and determine the two most solvent-exposed cysteines suitable for maleimide fluorophore labeling. Measure the exact distance in Angstroms between the sulfur (SG) atoms of these two highly exposed cysteines. Create a publication-quality figure showing the protein as a cartoon, the two chosen exposed cysteines as spheres, the buried cysteines as sticks, and a dashed line for the distance measurement. Save the figure to ~/PyMOL_Data/images/hemo_fret_sites.png. Write a report to ~/PyMOL_Data/hemo_fret_report.txt listing all cysteines identified, identifying the two exposed targets with their chain letters, and stating the SG-SG distance.
